CustomField.description: Max date between the SaaS and Billing Primary Contact's Last Connected Dates. Used in Onboarding Last Connected formula.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(Billing_Primary_Contact_Last_Connected__c), ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact_Last_Connected__c) ), NULL, DATE(1900, 01, 01) + MIN( BLANKVALUE(Billing_Primary_Contact_Last_Connected__c, DATE(4999, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01), BLANKVALUE(SaaS_Primary_Contact_Last_Connected__c, DATE(4999, 01, 01)) - DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max date between the SaaS and Billing Primary Contact's Last Connected Dates.
CustomField.label: Primary Contacts Last Connected
